chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 398 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1998/2020 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 30.08.2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
